included.description: Full-service Pilot truck stop at I-40 Exit 24 (US 209/Crabtree Rd), the only major truck stop between the Tennessee line and Canton. Approximately 60 truck parking spaces (8 reserved/paid), 6-7 diesel lanes, 4 showers, CAT scale, Subway and pizza on site, DEF, Wi-Fi. Westernmost full truck stop on I-40 in NC; note one-lane-each-way conditions continue west of Exit 7 through the Pigeon River Gorge during Helene reconstruction (full lanes targeted for 2028).
CAT scale located at the Pilot Travel Center at I-40 Exit 24 (US 209). Only verified CAT scale between the Tennessee line and Exit 37.

TravelCenters of America full-service travel center at I-40 Exit 37 (East Canton). 106 truck parking spaces with reserved parking, 8 diesel lanes, 8 showers, laundry, Country Pride restaurant, CAT scale, Wi-Fi, driver lounge, and on-site TA Truck Service shop with 4 bays. Open 24 hours.
CAT scale located at the TA travel center at I-40 Exit 37 (East Canton).

Fixed-location truck repair shop at the TA travel center, I-40 Exit 37. Four service bays handling tires, brakes, electrical, DOT inspections, advanced diagnostics, HVAC, alignments, trailers, and aftertreatment; RoadSquad roadside assistance is dispatched from this fixed facility.

included.business_name: North Carolina Welcome Center - I-40 West (Haywood County)
included.description: Official state welcome center on I-40 eastbound at mile marker 10 in Haywood County, the first NC facility for traffic entering from Tennessee. Restrooms, motorcoach/RV and truck-accessible parking, vending, picnic tables, and visitor information (building staffed 8 a.m.-5 p.m. daily; remodeled 2020). Located just east of the Pigeon River Gorge reconstruction zone; verify access during ongoing Helene rebuild, with full gorge lanes targeted for 2028.

held.hold_reason: Only one independent source (Truck Parking Club's own listing; page fetch blocked). Gravel lot with 24/7 access just north of I-40 near Exit 31, no overnight idling/reefer allowed per listing snippet; capacity, pricing, and current availability unverified by a second source.
Single source (Roadnow exit listing) claims truck parking, deli, store, showers, and laundromat near Exit 27; no corroborating source found and current operating status unverified.

held.business_name: Pilot Flying J Truck Care Service Center - Waynesville
held.hold_reason: Yelp listing (updated 2025) and directory mentions of 2 truck service bays at Pilot #393 (Exit 24), but the dedicated Truck Care shop's current operating status could not be confirmed on Pilot's official site; repair capability is already noted on the published Pilot #393 truck-stop listing.
Own website states it carries commercial tires, but heavy-duty/semi-truck service capability, exact address relative to I-40 exits, and a second corroborating source were not verified.

excluded.business_name: Sandy's Auto & Truck Plaza (721 Champion Dr, Canton, Exit 31)
excluded.reason: Listed as CLOSED on Yelp; remaining directory listings (TruckerPath, AllStays, TruckMap) appear stale. Canton's Champion Drive corridor suffered severe Pigeon River flooding. No evidence of current operation.

excluded.business_name: NCSHP Asheville Weigh Station (I-40 E/W, Mile Marker 40.5, Buncombe County)
excluded.reason: Verified official NC weigh station, but located at mile marker ~40.5 in Buncombe County — outside this segment (exits 0-37). No NC weigh station was verifiable via official sources within exits 0-37; the near-state-line scale complex on I-40 is on the Tennessee side.

Referenced in a third-party parking listing as the nearest truck stop, but no Love's location exists in Clyde/Haywood County; the nearest Love's on I-40 is in Marion, NC at Exit 86. Erroneous reference.
